base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pause_potion_slot_items — a ui (hud_readout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Inventory item icons — grid of ~12 collected item icons shown on pause grid (boomerang/bomb/bow/candle/flute/meat/potion/book/letter/ring/bracelet/clock). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Inventory item icons — grid of ~12 collected item icons shown on pause grid (boomerang/bomb/bow/candle/flute/meat/potion/book/letter/ring/bracelet/clock)
